scenario.key_phrase: I want to start but not sure about timing

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Hello! Good morning, am I speaking with Shruti? This is Priya from PhysicsWallah sales team. How are you doing today?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Hi, yes this is Shruti. I'm good, thank you. Actually I was expecting your call.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Great! Thank you for showing interest in PhysicsWallah. Before we proceed, can you tell me which class you're currently in?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: I'm in Class 11 right now, just started this year.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Perfect timing! Class 11 is actually the best time to start serious preparation. And which exam are you targeting - JEE or NEET?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: I want to prepare for NEET. I'm planning to become a doctor.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Wonderful! Medicine is a great field. So you'll be appearing for NEET 2027, right? That gives you around 18 months for preparation which is excellent.

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Actually, I think it's more like 13-14 months from now. But haan, 2027 batch.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: You're absolutely right! My apologies. So for NEET 2027, we have our NEET Yakeen batch which is specifically designed for Class 11 students like you. Have you started any preparation already?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: I've been doing some self-study but nothing structured. That's why I want to join a proper course. But I'm not sure about the timing - should I start now or wait?

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Bilkul start now! Class 11 foundation is crucial for NEET success. Our NEET Yakeen 2027 covers the complete syllabus with live classes, recorded lectures, and regular tests. Starting early gives you multiple revisions.

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: That sounds good. What's the fee structure for this course? And are there any other options available?

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: NEET Yakeen 2027 is priced at ₹33,999. We also offer 0% EMI through PW Pay - just ₹3,299 per month. That's less than what most families spend on daily chai! Are you looking at any specific budget range?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: The price seems reasonable. Are there any other courses I can consider? Maybe something different in approach or pricing?

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Sure! Apart from Yakeen, we also have other NEET courses with different teaching methodologies. But for Class 11 students, Yakeen is our most comprehensive program. What specific features are you looking for?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: I want good faculty, regular tests, and doubt clearing sessions. Also, flexibility to study at my own pace sometimes.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Perfect! NEET Yakeen has all of this - top faculty like Alakh sir's team, weekly tests, dedicated doubt clearing sessions, and both live + recorded lectures for flexibility. You can study anytime, anywhere.

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: This sounds convincing. But I'll need to discuss this with my parents before making any decision. Can you call back later?

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Of course! Family discussion is important for such decisions. When would be a good time to call back? And should I speak with your parents as well to explain the course details?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Maybe tomorrow evening around 7 PM? And yes, my parents might want to speak with you directly about the course and fees.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Perfect! I'll call tomorrow at 7 PM. Meanwhile, I'll also send you a detailed brochure on WhatsApp. Is this the best number to reach you - and your parents - tomorrow?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Yes, this number is fine. Please send the brochure, it will help me explain to my parents. Thank you so much, Priya!

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: My pleasure, Shruti! I'll send the details right away. Looking forward to speaking with you and your parents tomorrow. Have a great day and best of luck with your NEET preparation journey!

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Thank you so much! See you tomorrow then. Bye!

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Bye Shruti! Take care!
